title: Sour Dutch Yellow Onion Stir-Fry
description: A savory and flavorful sour Dutch yellow onion stir-fry made with a mix of yellow onions, pickled vegetables, and other nutritious ingredients suitable for post-workout recovery.

ingredients.name: Pickled vegetables (such as gherkins or cucumbers)

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced yellow onions and cook until translucent and golden brown, about 8-10 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic to release its aroma, cooking for an additional minute.
Include the pickled vegetables and water chestnuts if using, continuing to stir fry for another 2 minutes.
Pour in the soy sauce alternative and cook until it slightly thickens, about a minute more.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
